reviews.review_description:
This game needs a lot of work. Controls are very sensitive and wonky. 
The random noises and explosions are annoying and too much. 
It needs an online multiplayer mode with more cars.

I’m writing this review as it is clear this developer has the community in mind. I found the game on Reddit and was very pleased with the game’s quality. Additionally, the developer has been very generous in providing keys to those who comment (for a limited time). I would highly recommend this game and any others by the developer!

I'm enjoying the game. It definitely has a learning curve, and some of the controls are a little counterintuitive. 

The drifting is quite satisfying, and the crashes are just pure fun. 

I would not recommend this to anyone who gets motion sick easily. The crashes had me falling off my chair!

The game could use some quality of life updates. Like switching the gas to the right trigger and an option to steer with the analog stick. 

Also, the AI is bad. But they definitely add something special to the game.

Don't get me wrong, this game is janky, but there is something there that is quite fun. You just need to look past some things that are a little off.

I was given a key to try the game, so I don't know what it'll be priced at when it releases. I wouldn't recommend breaking the bank for it. If it can be bought for 10 dollars or less, then definitely give it a go!

There's a lot to like here: the lo-fi cars, the controls, diverse tracks and features, damage, decent v/o and tunes.

However, it's still very early in development and some of the quirks are certainly not for the light-hearted or feint of stomach. Getting repeatedly hit by AI vehicles is a hilariously awful audiovisual experience. Turn them off, however, and you have the beginnings of a nice cruising experience.

Got the game for free in a reddit give away. This project is awsome. It takes some time to get used to the controls but that comes from someone that only owns a quest3 for 2 months.^^ i'm excited for the future development of this game.
